data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding tracing assignments back to source records.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to trace assignments back to staffing/fulfillment source records deterministically. However, the evidence provided does not include any details about operational assignment rows or their source pointers, which are critical to confirming this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for these elements, but without concrete evidence of their existence or tracking, the validation cannot be completed, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of canonical operational assignment rows with source pointers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
